front: Work: a graphic memoir about growing up during the 1979 Iranian Revolution; the protagonist is sent to Vienna at age 14
Work: the protagonist's uncle Anoosh gives her bread swans before his execution; she reads the Marxist comic 'Dialectical Materialism'
Work: the protagonist designs an amusement park based on legendary characters for her college thesis; divorces husband Reza
Work: the protagonist parodies Michelangelo's Pieta by drawing Mary holding a dead soldier to gain admission to art school
Work: the protagonist rebels by listening to Michael Jackson and Kim Wilde during the Iranian Revolution
Work: the protagonist's friend Nami falls off a building after a wine-drinking party is shut down by religious police
Work: the protagonist replies 'You were all prostitutes before becoming nuns' when yelled at for eating pasta from a pot
Work: the protagonist sells cigarettes to pay for her grandmother's nose operation; old women discuss the title euphemism for vaginal surgery
